hero.title: Find the church, office, clergy, and giving links
hero.lede: This page brings together parish address details, office hours, clergy contact information, and ways to support the mission.

intro.title: A clear contact page for visitors
intro.body: Keep addresses, office hours, phone numbers, and giving links up to date here so people can find the parish easily.

cards.title: Location & Map
paragraphs: You can add a map link, parking details, public transport notes, or access information here.

cards.title: Parish Office Hours
paragraphs: These hours are pulled from the parish settings so they can be updated in one place.

cards.title: Office and clergy contact
paragraphs: The core office and priest contact details are also pulled from the parish settings.

cards.title: Donations
paragraphs: Use this card for the main giving link and any connected charitable projects or outreach funds.
